word: H4524 - מֵסַב - mêçab - may-sab' - That compass about

sections.paragraph:
Original: מסבּות מסבּים מסב

Transliteration: mêsab mesibbı̂ym mesibbôth

Phonetic: may-sab'

BDB Definition:

  1. round thing, surroundings, round about, that which surrounds, that which is round
    1. environs
      1. surrounding places
      2. round about (adverb)
    2. round table

Origin: from H5437

TWOT entry: 1456c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
